# Instagram Number Checker API

> Official CheckNumber code examples for a bulk, asynchronous API used to check Instagram account registration by phone number or email address.

Base URL: https://api.checknumber.ai
Authentication: X-API-Key request header

## Workflow

1. Submit: POST https://api.checknumber.ai/v1/tasks with `file` and `task_type=instagram`.
2. Poll: POST https://api.checknumber.ai/v1/gettasks with `task_id`.
3. Download: retrieve `result_url` after status becomes `exported`.

## Variants

- `task_type=instagram` — Instagram Phone Number Checker: https://docs.checknumber.ai/instagram-bulk-number-checker
- `task_type=instagram_email` — Instagram Email Checker: https://docs.checknumber.ai/instagram-email-checker

## Pricing

Current terms: https://checknumber.ai/pricing
Balance endpoint: GET https://api.checknumber.ai/v1/balance

## Docs

- Canonical documentation: https://docs.checknumber.ai/instagram-bulk-number-checker
- Dashboard and API keys: https://platform.checknumber.ai

## Code examples

- examples/python
- examples/nodejs
- examples/go
- examples/java
- examples/csharp
- examples/php
- examples/javascript
- examples/shell
